result.stdout:
SharpDetect v2.1.0
  Dynamic analysis framework for .NET programs

USAGE
  sharpdetect [options]
  sharpdetect [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  init              Creates a configuration file for analysis 
  run               Executes analysis based on provided configuration file 

You can run `sharpdetect [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
SharpDetect v2.1.0
  Dynamic analysis framework for .NET programs

USAGE
  sharpdetect [options]
  sharpdetect [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  init              Creates a configuration file for analysis 
  run               Executes analysis based on provided configuration file 

You can run `sharpdetect [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
SharpDetect v2.1.0
  Dynamic analysis framework for .NET programs

USAGE
  sharpdetect init --plugin <value> --target <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Creates a configuration file for analysis

OPTIONS
* -p|--plugin       Plugin type full name 
* -t|--target       Target application path 
  -o|--output       Output file path for the configuration file Default: "AnalysisDescriptor.json".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
SharpDetect v2.1.0
  Dynamic analysis framework for .NET programs

USAGE
  sharpdetect run <argumentsfile> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Executes analysis based on provided configuration file

PARAMETERS
* argumentsfile     Arguments file 

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
